product.name: McAlpine 75mm Anti -Siphon Bottle Trap
product.description: The McAlpine 75mm Anti-Siphon Bottle Trap is a high-quality plumbing solution designed to prevent unwanted odours and gurgling sounds in your drainage system. With a built-in anti-syphon valve, this bottle trap effectively neutralises negative syphonic pressure, ensuring smooth wastewater flow. It features multi-fit outlets, making it compatible with various pipe materials. product.name: McAlpine MacValve Self Closing Waste Valve
product.description: This MacValve self-closing waste valve can be fitted both horizontally and vertically. The MacValve membrane opens under water pressure to allow discharge to flow freely, then closes to form a tight seal that prevents foul odours or sewer gases from entering the building.  This MacValve can be fitted in many installations where a non-return is beneficial and can also be used to take the discharge from a pressure relief valve on an unvented domestic hot water storage system. When this MacValve is installed horizontally, the flow arrow must be in the uppermost position. This MacValve can be fitted in many installations where a non-return is beneficial and can also be used to take the discharge from a pressure relief valve on an unvented domestic hot water storage system. When this MacValve is installed horizontally, the flow arrow must be in the uppermost position. Features & Benefits: McAlpine MacValve Self Closing Waste ValveMembrane remains sealedFor installations where a non-return is beneficialFits horizontally or verticallyNo water seal to prevent dry out through evaporation or lack of useSize options available Please note: This MacValve self-closing waste valve is not recommended for use with shower trays unless there is access for maintenance.

product.name: Climaflex Polyethylene Pipe Insulation 1m Lengths
product.description: Climaflex is a flexible polyethylene foam based closed cell pipe insulation suitable for a broad range of water and heating applications, frost protection and impact protection. It can be glued, taped or simply pushed together to form an insulated pipe, making it a convenient, versatile option. Available in 1mtr segments and multiple pipe sizes, Climaflex pipe insulation combines high performance and low cost in most domestic applications, giving you the best of both worlds. While you can also use it externally, keep in mind that it will degrade faster in sunlight.What's more, Climaflex pipe insulation is a sustainable, environmentally friendly solution that is completely CFC (chlorofluorocarbon) and HCFC (hydrochlorofluorocarbon) free and has an ODP (ozone depletion potential) of zero. It can accommodate temperatures ranging from -45 °C to +105 °C and has excellent thermal conductivity. Features & Benefits: Climaflex Polyethylene Pipe Insulation 1m LengthsHigh performance polyethylene-based closed-cell foam pipe insulation  Suitable for diverse heating and plumbing applications  Available in 1m segments and multiple pipe and thickness sizes  Thermal conductivity of 0.038 W/mK at 40°C, 0.036 W/mK at 20°C and 0.034 W/mK at 0°C  Environmentally friendly  Easy to fit
product.variant_name: Climaflex Polyethylene Pipe Insulation - 15mm x 13mm x 1m Length

Features & Benefits: Climaflex Polyethylene Pipe Insulation 1m LengthsHigh performance polyethylene-based closed-cell foam pipe insulation  Suitable for diverse heating and plumbing applications  Available in 1m segments and multiple pipe and thickness sizes  Thermal conductivity of 0.038 W/mK at 40°C, 0.036 W/mK at 20°C and 0.034 W/mK at 0°C  Environmentally friendly  Easy to fit

product.description: These boxes of Climaflex pipe insulation are a practical, cost-effective way to stock up on this fantastic polyethylene-based foam system. Ideal for a range of cold and hot water heating applications, this insulation can be glued, taped, or firmed pushed together to fit over pipework, making installation straightforward. The closed-cell construction of this insulation also means it won't crumble or fray when worked, cutting down on clean-up.With excellent resistance to ignition, water vapour, and water absorption, this Climaflex insulation is a versatile all-rounder that's sure to have a place in your next plumbing project. product.name: REMS Universal Diamond Core UDKB 32mm to 300mm x 420mm x UNC 1 1/4 inch
product.description: This Rems universal diamond core UDKB is available from 32mm up to 300mm and is a high-quality diamond core. Inductively soldered and universally usable for dry and wet drilling, handheld or with a drill stand, this diamond core is ideal for universal use in reinforced concrete, masonry and other materials.Featuring diamond segments with wedge-shaped cuts for fast, easy and quiet drilling, this diamond core has a single connecting thread UNC 1 1/4 inch inside and a depth of 420mm. product.name: Rockwool Rocklap 20mm Wall x 1m Foil Faced Pipe Insulation
product.description: The Rockwool mineral wool sections of stone wool insulation are comprised of a layer of factory applied foil which faces a self-adhesive lap. Produced pre-slit, they allow for quick and easy application. The sections provide acoustic and thermal insulation to heating, ventilation and air conditioning pipes that have temperatures in the 0°C to 250°C range.ROCKWOOL Rocklap insulation sections are an ideal solution for a large number of applications in industrial and residential settings alike. The self-adhesive lap allows them to snap onto the pipework to save you time. After that, all you need to do is simply use backing tape to seal the joint fully. 20mm thick and 1m in length, these insulation sections are ideal for pipes that are between 17mm and 60mm in diameter. All in all, they are extremely convenient and versatile.Features & Benefits: Rockwool Rocklap 20mm Wall x 1m Foil Faced Pipe InsulationPre-cut mineral wool insulation sections available in different widths20mm thickness x 1m lengthHigh performing and easy to installCompatible with pipes between 17mm and 60mm in diameter

product.description: The mineral wool pre-formed sections of stone wool insulation from ROCKWOOL Rocklap, which consist of a layer of factory-applied foil facing and a self-adhesive lap, are produced pre-slit to allow for easy application. The sections provide acoustic and thermal insulation to ventilation, heating and air conditioning pipes with temperatures from 0°C to 250°C. They measure 25mm thick and 1m in length, and they are suitable for pipes that are 17mm to 114mm in diameter, making them extremely versatile.The ROCKWOOL Rocklap insulation sections can be implemented in a wide range of applications in residential and industrial settings. Thanks to the self-adhesive lap, they simply snap onto the pipework. product.description: The mineral wool pre-formed sections of stone wool insulation from ROCKWOOL Rocklap, which consist of a layer of factory-applied foil facing and a self-adhesive lap, are produced pre-slit to allow for easy application. The sections provide acoustic and thermal insulation to ventilation, heating and air conditioning pipes with temperatures from 0°C to 250°C. They measure 25mm thick and 1m in length, and they are suitable for pipes that are 17mm to 114mm in diameter, making them extremely versatile.The ROCKWOOL Rocklap insulation sections can be implemented in a wide range of applications in residential and industrial settings. Thanks to the self-adhesive lap, they simply snap onto the pipework. You can then use backing tape to fully seal the joint.Features & Benefits: Rockwool Rocklap 25mm Wall x 1m Foil Faced Pipe InsulationFor purchase in a range of widthsHigh performance foil covered mineral wool insulation sections suited to pipes 17mm to 114mm in diameter25mm thickness x 1m length

product.name: Honeywell Home V4073A Motorised Mid Position Diverter Valve
product.description:
The V4073A Valve has been designed to control the flow of water in domestic central heating systems, where both radiator and hot water cylinder circuits are pumped. It is typically suited for small to medium sized installations. The Mid-position Diverter Valve should be used in conjunction with a room thermostat and cylinder thermostat to provide full temperature control of a conventional, fully pumped central heating installation. When used in this way, the control system is known as Sundial Y Plan and the components can be connected together using the Sundial Plan Wiring Centre which has dedicated terminations and there is no need for a wiring diagram.

An alternative method of wiring is to use the Honeywell 10-way Junction Box (42002116-002) together with the Honeywell Sundial Plans Wiring Booklet.Features & Benefits: Honeywell Home V4073A Motorised Mid Position Diverter ValveSpring return actionThree position operationPowerhead replaceable without draining downManual lever for filling/draining downQuiet operation, minimal power consumptionProvides electrical output to boiler and/or pump
product.variant_name: DISCO - Honeywell Home V4073A1088 Motorised Mid Position 28mm Diverter Valve

product.name: Honeywell Home Evohome ACH28 & EVA1 Radiator Valve Adaptors
product.description:
This is not the same adaptor that comes with the HR91/92 units.These radiator valve adaptors are designed specifically for use with the highly sophisticated, energy-saving Evohome underfloor heating system by Honeywell. They will improve your systems efficiency, making it easier to operate and helping you save even more money on your energy bills. product.name: Honeywell Home RPZ Backflow Preventer Valve
product.description:
The BA295S backflow preventer protects drinking water systems against back pressure, backflow and back siphonage. They can be used to protect against applications up to and including liquid category 4 in residential, commercial and industrial buildings. Typically, these valves are to be fitted inline to the supplies of commercial washing machines, restaurant kitchens and industrial processes. KIWA approved.
Features & Benefits: Honeywell Home RPZ Backflow Preventer ValveOptimum protection of drinking water supplyTriple security - two check valves and a discharge valveIntegral inlet strainerInlet check valve and discharge valve are combined in one replaceable cartridgeLow pressure loss and high flow rateCompact constructionBA295i variant - stainless steel body

product.name: Belimo 2 Port Valve & 230v Actuator with Powered Open & Close
product.description: This Belimo valve and actuator combo is a reliable and versatile product for automating hot and cold water systems. The valve operates via signals sent to the actuator mounted above, allowing a high degree of control. The actuator controls both the valve's opening and closing movement and comes in a range of standard imperial pipe diameters.With a nickel-plated hot-pressed brass valve housing, these valves can be relied on for long-lasting performance throughout the life of your system and can be retrofitted with other actuators in Belimo's extensive range. In addition, in terms of their seal between inlet and outlet, these valves, when closed, have an extremely low leakage rate and are 'air bubble tight' in compliance with EN12266.Features & Benefits: Belimo 2 Port Valve & 230v Actuator with Powered Open & CloseValve is opened and closed by the actuatorLong-lasting nickel-plated brass constructionAir bubble tight when closed in compliance with EN12266Comes in a range of common imperial pipe diameters

product.name: Belimo 3 Port Valve with a 240V Open/Close Actuator
product.description: This Belimo valve and actuator combo is a flexible, reliable solution for automating both hot and cold water systems. The valve operates using signals sent to the top-mounted actuator, allowing a high degree of control. The actuator controls both the valve's opening and closing movement and comes in a range of standard imperial pipe diameters.With a nickel-plated hot-pressed brass valve housing, these valves can be relied on for long-lasting performance throughout the life of your system and can be retrofitted with other actuators in Belimo's extensive range. In addition, in terms of their seal between inlet and outlet, these valves, when closed, have an extremely low leakage rate and are 'air bubble tight' in compliance with EN12266. Finally, all valves are supplied with an auxiliary switch for greater flexibility and resilience against failure.Features & Benefits: Belimo 3 Port Valve with a 240V Open/Close ActuatorValve is opened and closed by the actuatorLong-lasting nickel-plated brass constructionAir bubble tight when closed in compliance with EN12266Comes in a range of common imperial pipe diameters

product.name: Belimo 2 Port Valve with a 240v Actuator and Auxiliary Switch - Powered Open/Spring Return
product.description:

product.name: Altecnic Flow Regulator Ball Valve
product.description: This Calflow-Plus flow regular ball valve from Altecnic is available with a flow rate ranging from 4 to 8 litres per minute. This combined flow regulating ball valve with interchangeable flow cartridges is suitable for maintaining the flow to a tap, mixer shower or mixing valve. Supplied with a Grey (4L/m), Black (6L/m) or White (8L/m) flow cartridge installed in the valve, this ball valve allows the outlet to be isolated for maintenance. product.name: Altecnic Reflex Horizontal Expansion Vessels for Potable Water
product.description: This Reflex horizontal expansion vessel is for potable water. Closed hot water circuits cannot compress water, so any rise in volume from temperature changes needs to be accommodated by an expansion vessel. When water is cold, the pre-charge pressure makes the bladder collapse until the pump starts up as the bladder inflates. The system temperature increases due to the associated increase in pressure and volume, in turn allowing expanded water to enter the bladder adding volume and lowering pressure. With the decrease in temperature decreases, the pre-charge pressure pushes water back to the main water circuit.Features & Benefits: Altecnic Reflex Horizontal Expansion Vessels for Potable WaterFor potable waterAccommodates volume changeSize options available
product.variant_name: WOFF - Altecnic Reflex Horizontal Expansion Vessels for Potable Water - 25l

product.name: Altecnic ERED Bypass Valve
product.description: This 'ERES' series automatic bypass valve from Altecnic is a robust and reliable form of passive protection for boilers and domestic heating systems. This valve solves the problem of boilers working against a closed circuit in your heating system when all thermostatic radiator valves are closed. Coming in either a straight or angled variant in various diameters, these valves can be essential for guarding against ultimately avoidable wear and damage to your boiler.Features & Benefits: Altecnic ERED Bypass ValveProvides excellent protection against avoidable boiler wear and tearRobust passive protection and long service lifeEasy to install and fit thanks to compression fitting designComes in either straight or angled variants in a variety of diameters

product.name: Altecnic Pressure Reducing Valve
product.description: The Series 535 range of high performance dial-up pressure reducing valves from Altecnic is designed for hot and cold systems in semi-commercial and industrial applications. They're pre-adjustable, so you can set them at a required discharge pressure between 1 and 6 bar before installation with the help of the adjustment knob with pressure setting indicator. For greater convenience, the internal cartridge and control knob mechanism come assembled as one unit, making it easy to remove for inspection, cleaning and maintenance. Thanks to the compensated seat design of these pressure reducing valves, the set downstream pressure is independent of upstream pressure variations. In addition, the hydraulic profile makes it entirely possible to achieve low pressure losses even when a large number of outlets are open. The control stem housing of the cartridge consists of a highly adhesion-resistant plastic material, which helps prevent the formation of scale deposits forming. Available in multiple sizes, these valves operate at a maximum inlet pressure of 25 bar at a maximum temperature of 40C°. Features & Benefits: Altecnic Pressure Reducing ValveHigh performance DZR brass pressure reducing valves  Suitable for semi-commercial and industrial applications  Easy to install, clean and maintain  Outlet adjustment range of 1 - 6 bar  Maximum inlet pressure of 25 bar  WRAS approved
product.variant_name: Altecnic Series 535 Pressure Reducing Valve - 1/2 inch

product.name: Altecnic Reflex Expansion Vessel For Heating System - 8l up to 800l
product.description: The Reflex nitrogen-filled heating expansion vessel range by Altecnic is suitable for use with most heating or cooling systems. The vessels are manufactured to strict PED 97/23/EC Directive and BS EN 13831:2007 'Closed expansion vessels with built in diaphragm for installation in water' standards and tested according to the Pressure Systems Directive. They're available in a wide range of sizes, from 8 litres to more than 800 litres, making them a versatile, convenient solution. The vessels are made by welding the sections together, resulting in a sturdy, reliable structure suitable for internal pressures up to 3 bar for smaller sizes and 6 bar for larger sizes as well as flow temperatures of up to 120°C. They feature a non-replaceable diaphragm and grey-coated epoxy.But that's not all! Reflex vessels have low glass permeability and are resistant to ethylene or propylene glycol mixtures. In addition, there are many benefits to using nitrogen in the vessels. To begin with, nitrogen improves the vessel life span by reducing corrosion inside the vessel and prevents loss of pre-charge pressure. It also permeates through rubber slower than oxygen and is far less reactive to both steel and aluminium, creating fewer debris inside the vessel. Last but not least, nitrogen does not degrade rubber, prolonging the membrane life.Features & Benefits: Altecnic Reflex Expansion Vessel For Heating System - 8l up to 800lDurable nitrogen-filled heating expansion vessels  Consist of a carbon steel shell with carbon steel connections and synthetic rubber diaphragm  Powder Epoxy coating  1.5 bar factory pre-charge  Available in 8l to 800l+ sizes  Maximum vessel temp of 70°CPlease note: 800l+ capacity available, please call for more info.
product.variant_name: Altecnic Reflex Expansion Vessel For Heating Systems - 25l

The vessels are manufactured to strict PED 97/23/EC Directive and BS EN 13831:2007 'Closed expansion vessels with built in diaphragm for installation in water' standards and tested according to the Pressure Systems Directive. They're available in a wide range of sizes, from 8 litres to more than 800 litres, making them a versatile, convenient solution. The vessels are made by welding the sections together, resulting in a sturdy, reliable structure suitable for internal pressures up to 3 bar for smaller sizes and 6 bar for larger sizes as well as flow temperatures of up to 120°C. They feature a non-replaceable diaphragm and grey-coated epoxy.But that's not all! Reflex vessels have low glass permeability and are resistant to ethylene or propylene glycol mixtures. In addition, there are many benefits to using nitrogen in the vessels. To begin with, nitrogen improves the vessel life span by reducing corrosion inside the vessel and prevents loss of pre-charge pressure. It also permeates through rubber slower than oxygen and is far less reactive to both steel and aluminium, creating fewer debris inside the vessel. Last but not least, nitrogen does not degrade rubber, prolonging the membrane life.Features & Benefits: Altecnic Reflex Expansion Vessel For Heating System - 8l up to 800lDurable nitrogen-filled heating expansion vessels  Consist of a carbon steel shell with carbon steel connections and synthetic rubber diaphragm  Powder Epoxy coating  1.5 bar factory pre-charge  Available in 8l to 800l+ sizes  Maximum vessel temp of 70°CPlease note: 800l+ capacity available, please call for more info.

product.name: Altecnic Reflex Robokit Extra Pressure Vessel & Kit
product.description: Sealed central heating systems are highly effective and simple to install, and Robokit Extra is one of the best available on the UK market. These systems have to include an expansion vessel and certain ancillary components to accommodate water expansion. And the Robokit Extra kit consists of everything you need to get going, including an expansion vessel with a sealed system kit which contains an expansion vessel, a wall mounting bracket, a quattro 4-way connector, a safety relief valve complete with pressure gauge and a filling loop.Because it's energy efficient and virtually maintenance-free, this kit will save you money on your energy bills for years to come. It will also improve the comfort of your home by significantly reducing noise thanks to higher system pressure. Built to the strictest British standards, it's available in sizes from 8l to 80l, making it a convenient option for a wide variety of settings. Features & Benefits: Altecnic Reflex Robokit Extra Pressure Vessel & KitHigh performance sealed system kit  Component siting alternatives for system flexibility  Noise reduction  Highly resistant to corrosion  Low maintenance costs  Maximum working pressure of 4 bar  Maximum system temperature of 100°C

product.name: Altecnic Reflex Vertical Expansion Vessels For Potable Water
product.description: This Reflex vertical expansion vessel is for potable water and comes in various sizing options. Closed hot water circuits cannot compress water, meaning that rise in volume from temperature change has to be accommodated by an appropriate expansion vessel. For cold water, the pre-charge pressure causes the bladder to collapse until the pump begins as the bladder inflates. The system temperature increases from the pressure and volume, in turn allowing expanded water to flow into the bladder to add volume and lessen pressure. After the temperature decreases, the pre-charge pressure pushes water back to the main water circuit.Features & Benefits: Altecnic Reflex Vertical Expansion Vessels For Potable Water10 bar maximum pressureVarious sizesFor potable water

product.name: Altecnic Safety Relief Valves Series 312
product.description: Ensure your system operates safely and efficiently with the Altecnic Safety Relief Valves Series 312, expertly designed to release excess pressure and prevent damage to equipment. Engineered for water and air applications, these valves are a reliable choice for maintaining optimal pressure in heating, cooling, and water supply systems.The Series 312 valves are built to perform under a wide range of conditions, with a working temperature range from 5°C to 110°C and a set pressure range from 1 to 10 bar. product.name: Altecnic Antifreeze Brass Valve
product.description: Eliminate the risk of expensive equipment damage caused by ice formation in your heat pump system with the Altecnic Antifreeze Brass Valve. This reliable accessory, which will allow the circuit medium to be drained when temperatures reach an average of 3?C, will attach to fittings and M BSP pipes connected by a union, ensuring a long-lasting and durable solution.This affordable option is environmentally friendly and eliminates the need for antifreeze. Its durable brass body also reduces system maintenance and management costs.Features & Benefits: Altecnic Antifreeze Brass ValveA  valve that will prevent costly damage to equipment, valves, and pipeworkAvailable in various sizesHelps avoid ice formation which can result in significant damageFits various fittings and M BSP pipes connected by a unionAn eco-friendly solution that eliminates the need for anti-freezing substancesDurable brass body reduces management and maintenance costsNo electricity supply required after installationWide temperature range and high operating pressure (-30 to 60°C, maximum 10 bar)After installation, this system is low-maintenance and does not need electricity to function. It boasts a temperature range of -30 to 60°C and can handle up to 10 bar of operating pressure, making it versatile for various uses. Moreover, it has a broad temperature range of 0 to 65°C.

product.description: These 'ART 400' screwed flexible connectors from Albion are highly versatile and hardwearing parts that use quality materials and clever design features for a sturdy and reliable plumbing solution. With a variant for both BSP and NPT types, these robust connectors use malleable iron union ends and reinforced nylon cord fabric for their construction. product.name: Albion Art 642 1 inch Gunmetal Safety Valve
product.description: This safety valve has a body made from gunmetal and features a screwed BSP parallel (ISO 228). Suitable for gases, liquids and steam, this safety valve is fitted with a diaphragm to protect the spring housing.With high capacity discharge, this safety valve is available in a range of set pressures from 3.0 Bar to 6.0 Bar. product.name: Albion Art 642 3/4 inch Gunmetal Safety Valve
product.description: This ART 642 3/4 inch safety valve from Albion has a body fabricated from gunmetal and includes a screwed BSP parallel (ISO 228). Suitable for gases, liquids and steam, this safety valve is fitted with a diaphragm to protect the spring housing.With high capacity discharge, this gunmetal safety valve is available in a variety of set pressures from 3.0 Bar to 6.0 Bar. Typical applications for this WRAS-approved gunmetal safety valve include pressure vessels, mechanical engineering, pump protection, pressure booster systems water/air-side, cooling/chilling systems and stream and industrial boiler systems. Features & Benefits: Albion Art 642 3/4 inch Gunmetal Safety Valve ISO 4126-1, PED 2014/68/EU, TRD 421Classification - GL, DNVATEX approval available at extra costWRAS approved (1/2 inch-1 1/4 inch) other sizes under approvalSet range 0.5 to 16 BarScrewed BSP parallel (ISO 228)Suitable for gases, liquids and steamFitted with Diaphragm to protect spring housingHigh capacity discharge24-month warranty

product.name: Albion Art 237 Ductile Iron PN16 Flanged Double Check Valve
product.description: This Albion Art 237 ductile iron PN16 flanged double check valve is a robust, WRAS-approved solution for preventing backflow in water systems. Designed as a non-return valve, it features a durable ductile iron body with a protective epoxy-coated finish, ensuring long service life and excellent resistance to corrosion. Suitable for a wide range of commercial and industrial applications, the valve is engineered for reliable performance under PN16 pressure conditions.This valve can be installed in any orientation, offering flexibility during installation. Available in a range of sizes, the Albion Art 237 provides dependable backflow protection while meeting UK water regulation requirements, making it a trusted choice for professional installations.Features & Benefits: Albion Art 237 Ductile Iron PN16 Flanged Double Check ValveFlange mounted PN16 only (EN1092-2)Durable ductile iron construction with epoxy coatingOperates in any position with multiple size options available

product.name: Stainless Steel 3 piece ball valve
product.description: The Stainless Steel 3-Piece Ball Valve is a durable and versatile valve designed for efficient flow control in a variety of applications. Made from high-quality stainless steel, this valve is built to withstand harsh environments, offering excellent resistance to corrosion and wear. Its 3-piece construction allows for easy maintenance and cleaning, ensuring long-lasting performance. Ideal for both commercial and industrial use, it features full port flow for maximum efficiency with minimal pressure drop.This ball valve is equipped with a secure locking mechanism for reliable sealing and operation, and its design allows for easy disassembly without removing the entire valve from the pipeline. product.name: Spirotech SpiroCombi MB3 Magnetic Air and Dirt Separator
product.description: This SpiroCombi MB3 Magnetic Air Dirt Separator provides a solution for untreated systems where air may cause issues such as flow interruptions or even a complete system breakdown. Specially designed for the simultaneous removal of air and dirt, this SpiroCombi separator removes air, microbubbles and dirt particles from system water continuously. Separating the dirt that mainly consists of magnetite that accumulates wherever a magnetic field is present, this SpiroCombi separator is suitable for valves, heat exchangers, pipes, radiators, pumps and calorimeters. Reducing the costs associated with repairs, parts and downtime, this SpiroCombi separator minimises contamination which if untreated, leads to reduced system performance and therefore higher energy costs without any shut-off valves or bypass required. Features & Benefits: Spirotech SpiroCombi MB3 Magnetic Air and Dirt SeparatorRemoves circulating air and micro bubbles effectivelyVery small particles from 0.005mm are separated and removedDirt can be discharge while the system is in operationNo shut-off valves or bypass requiredConstant low-pressure dropExceptional guarantee
product.variant_name: Spirotech SpiroCombi MB3 Magnetic Air and Dirt Separator - 1 1/2 inch

product.name: Spirotech Brass SpiroVent Air Separator
product.description: This SpiroVent air separator/deaerator from Spirotech should always be fitted at the hottest point within your system. In the case of a heating system, for example, this is the point where the water exits the boiler. In the case of a cooling system, it is in the return before the chiller unit. In the case of a heating system, for example, this is the point where the water exits the boiler. In the case of a cooling system, it is in the return before the chiller unit. When installed in the correct location this SpiroVent separator has the capability to deaerate your entire system as it can make the water absorptive.Features & Benefits: Spirotech Brass SpiroVent Air Separator 180°C10 BarDeaerates your entire systemTo be installed at the hottest point within your heating or cooling systemMakes water absorptiveRange of sizes

product.name: Spirotech SpiroCross Brass Hydraulic Air Separator
product.description: This brass hydraulic air separator is a reliable fitting for maintaining optimal hydraulic balance in heating systems, HVAC systems, and between primary and secondary pumps. SpiroCross' system achieves active deaeration and dirt removal, with even the tiniest air bubbles and particles removed from the system reliably, time after time.Coming in a range of input/output diameters, this air separator system has a compact, vertical profile that makes them easy to install, as well as cutting down on precious space.Features & Benefits: Spirotech SpiroCross Brass Hydraulic Air SeparatorAchieves consistent and reliable deaeration of systemsEven extremely fine dirt particles are removed from flowCompact, vertical design cuts down on spaceRange of input/output diameters available.

product.name: Spirotech SpiroCross Commercial Hydraulic Air Separator Insulation Kit
product.description: This SpiroCross Commercial Hydraulic Air Separator Insulation Kit with Spirotech Accessories contains insulation sets for domestic heating systems. This SpiroCross kit unites hydraulic balancing, deaeration and dirt separation in one compact unit and requires only four connections instead of eight. This SpiroCross kit ensures that the steel unit does not become congested, due to trapped dirt being collected outside of the flow, and can be flushed while the installation is in operation. Features & Benefits: Spirotech SpiroCross Commercial Hydraulic Air Separator Insulation Kit3 in 1 savings - space, time and costsMinimal fluid mixingRemoval of micro bubbles and dirt particlesIncrease energy efficiencyIndustry-leading 5-year guarantee
product.variant_name: Spirotech SpiroCross Commercial Hydraulic Air Separator Insulation Kit - DN50

product.name: Spirotech SpiroCombi PN16 Steel Flanged Air and Dirt Seperator
product.description: This SpiroCombi Airt Dirt Separator is PN16 Steel Flanged and provides a solution for untreated systems where air may cause issues such as flow interruptions or even a complete system breakdown. Separating the dirt that mainly consists of magnetite that accumulates wherever a magnetic field is present, this SpiroCombi separator is suitable for valves, heat exchangers, pipes, radiators, pumps and calorimeters. Reducing the costs associated with repairs, parts and downtime, this SpiroCombi separator minimises contamination which if untreated, leads to reduced system performance and therefore higher energy costs without any shut-off valves or bypass required. Features & Benefits: Spirotech SpiroCombi PN16 Steel Flanged Air and Dirt Seperator110°C maximum temperatureOperating pressure 10 BarEnergy savingHighly efficient air and dirt removalQuick and easy cleaning without messUnique high-powered magnetProtects critical system componentsRemoves circulating air and micro bubbles effectivelyDirt can be discharged while the system is in operationConstant low-pressure drop

product.name: Spirotech SpiroVent Brass RV2 Air Separator
product.description:
The SpiroVent RV2 by Spirotech is a high performance fully universal deaerator which removes circulating air and microbubbles from system water easily and effectively. Made of brass, it's available in a 22mm or 28mm connection diameter size and operational at pressures of up to 10 bar and temperatures of up to 110°C. The SpiroVent RV2 is ideally positioned at the hottest point of the installation, where the water leaves the heater or enters the cooler.All in all, this energy-saving, easy-to-install air separator greatly reduces the need for manual venting and removes trapped air when installed at the correct location.Features & Benefits: Spirotech SpiroVent Brass RV2 Air Separator Energy-saving brass air separatorEffectively removes circulating air and micro bubblesInhibits the formation of corrosion productsStops irritating noisesRemoves air inclusions and prevents cold radiators
Eliminates the need for manual venting
product.variant_name: Spirotech SpiroVent Brass RV2 Air Separator - 28mm

product.name: Spirotech SpiroVent Solar Air Separator
product.description: This SpiroVent Air Separator is a deaerator that should always be installed at the hottest point within a system. In the case of a heating system, for example, this is the point where the water exits the boiler. In the case of a cooling system, it is in the return before the chiller unit. When installed in the correct location, this SpiroVent has the capability to deaerate your entire system as it can make the water absorptive. Features & Benefits: Spirotech SpiroVent Solar Air SeparatorRange of sizesSolar180°C10 BarShould be installed at the hottest point within a systemDeaerates an entire systemMake water absorptive

product.name: Spirotech SpiroTrap Brass Dirt Separator
product.description:
This SpiroTrap MBL dirt separator is a robust and reliable countermeasure against magnetic and non-magnetic dirt particles building up in pipework, slowly damaging the system and lessening efficiency. Available in a range of connection sizes from 1¼", 1½" and 2", these separators provide essential protection without complex and messy maintenance.Easy to install and maintain, these dirt separators do not require any bypasses or shut-off valves to work and can be emptied whilst the system is in operation, taking only a few seconds and eliminating downtime. In addition, these separators can remove extremely fine particles from the system, as small as 5?m/0.005mm.Features & Benefits: Spirotech SpiroTrap Brass Dirt SeparatorRobust protection against magnetic and non-magnetic dirtDoes not require bypasses or shut-off valves to functionEasy and straightforward installation compared to other filter systems
Can be cleared and cleaned with shutting off the systemAvailable in a range of connection sizes from 1¼", 1½" and 2"
product.variant_name: Spirotech SpiroTrap Brass MBL Dirt Separator - 1 1/4 inch

product.name: Scalemaster Filter Cartridges
product.description: These Filter Cartridges from Scalemaster are available in a range of materials. The Carbon Block Filter Cartridge from Scalemaster is a CB-EC Carbon Block cartridge, with a sintered activated carbon block obtained from coconut shells that can filter and treat water from chlorine's unpleasant odour and taste. Manufactured in Italy using special technologies, the CB-EC block filter cartridge has been made to reduce greenhouse gases in the atmosphere.The Carbon/Polyphosphate Filter Cartridges are made from virgin Granular Activated Carbon which is compliant with the standards of UNI EN ISO 12915-1:2004  for products used to treat water intended for human consumption.  Features & Benefits: Scalemaster Filter CartridgesVariety of Scalemaster Filter CartridgesTreats water for human consumptionCB-EC Carbon Block filter cartridgeVirgin Granular Activated Carbon Polyphosphate filter cartridge

product.name: Suprion Electrostatic Water Treatment Unit
product.description: This Suprion Electrostatic Water Treatment Unit is an advanced water treatment device that prevents the deposit of calcium scale, magnesium scale and silica scale, as well as a build-up of rust and slime. Gradually exfoliating and removing existing scale, this unit employs a unique system found nowhere in the world with static electricity that is generated from water flowing through this Suprion unit. With no chemicals required, treated water is free from contamination making this Suprion unit an environmentally friendly device. Suitable for both domestic and commercial uses, this Suprion unit does not need any external electrical power. Features & Benefits: Suprion Electrostatic Water Treatment UnitAdvanced water treatment devicePrevents the deposit of calcium, magnesium and silica scaleStops a build-up of rust and slimeGradually exfoliates and removes existing scaleStatic electricityNo chemicals requiredTreated water free from contaminationEnvironmentally friendlyCan be used in both commercial and domesticNo external electrical power
product.variant_name: Suprion Electrostatic Water Treatment Unit Scalemaster Suprion Electrostatic 20mm 725g

product.name: Softline Crystal Water Filter  Cartridges
product.description: These Softline Crystal water filter cartridges are available with a variety to choose from. The 901169 Crystal and the high specification 901183 Crystal+ drinking water filter kits comprise an integrated carbon filter/filter house, a tap and all pipework connections to connect to your mains supply with a push-fit filter for the Crystal kit and a twist release filter, push-fit valved head and integral bracket for the Crystal+ kit. The 901176 replacement cartridge for the crystal water filter kit has a nominal 3000-litre treatment capacity and a 6-month/3000-litre life, ensuring the filter change has a simple pull-off and push-in operation. Ideal for removing sediment and particles while improving taste and odour and inhibiting scale build-up, these Softline Crystal water filters reduce chlorine, herbicides, pesticides and industrial chemicals. More cost-effective than bottled water, these Crystal water filters are easy to change, do not require power and there is no need to cut off your water supply. product.name: Scalemaster Corrosion Master
product.description: This Scalemaster Corrosion Master provides a non-chemical method of protection for your central heating system's primary circuit against corrosion and limescale precipitation. This Corrosion Master contains a sacrificial zinc anode wrapped in a copper mesh which removes dissolved oxygen from the re-circulating heating system water by converting it to a harmless hydroxide species which does not support the corrosion process. Features & Benefits: Scalemaster Corrosion Master22mmCM5 - 5 yearsCM10 - 10 yearsNon-chemical methodFor central heating systemsProtects against corrosion and limescale precipitationSacrificial zinc anode wrapped in a copper meshRemoves dissolved oxygen and converts it to a harmless hydroxide species

product.name: Scalemaster Electrolytic Gold Limescale Inhibitor
product.description:
The Scalemaster Electrolytic Gold Limescale Inhibitor is a cost-effective and maintenance-free solution for reducing limescale build-up in domestic water systems. Designed for easy installation directly onto copper or plastic pipework, this passive device works by altering the structure of scale-forming minerals in the water, making them less likely to adhere to pipes, heating elements, and appliances. It provides effective protection for combi boilers, water heaters, showers, and other hot water systems, extending their lifespan and maintaining efficiency.
Constructed with high-quality materials, the Electrolytic Gold model offers enhanced durability and consistent performance without the need for power supply or ongoing maintenance. Its compact design makes it suitable for installation in tight spaces.. Ideal for homeowners seeking a reliable way to manage hard water issues without chemicals or salt.
Features & Benefits: Scalemaster Electrolytic Gold Limescale InhibitorScalemaster Patented TechnologySolder FittingDifferent sizes available
Standards & CertificationWRAS Approved
product.variant_name: Scalemaster Electrolytic Gold Limescale Inhibitor - 35mm

product.name: Grundfos MAGNA1 D 32 220 A RatedEuP Ready Variable Speed Twin Head Circulator 240V
product.description:
This Grundfos MAGNA1 32 series (180) 'A' Rated/EuP Ready variable speed twin head circulator with an easy selection of pump settings has no maintenance requirements and an extremely low life cycle cost. This MAGNA1 circulator pump is designed for circulating liquids in heating systems with variable flows and for domestic hot-water systems.Applications include heating systems, air-conditioning and heating, main pump and mixing loops. This pump is also suitable for systems with hot-water priority as an external signal can immediately force the pump to operate according to the max. curve, for example in solar heating systems.Features & Benefits: Grundfos MAGNA1 D 32 220 A RatedEuP Ready Variable Speed Twin Head Circulator 240VLow noise levelMaintenance-free and long lifeLow energy consumptionSimple installationSafe selectionLiquid temperature range from -10°C to 110°CWater pumped liquidThree proportional-pressure curves, three constant-pressure curves and three fixed-speed curves availableNine light fields for indication of pump settingsComplies with EuP requirementsThis MAGNA1 32 series 240V circulator has 180mm port-to-port dimensions and 2" BSPM screwed connections. This pump is also suitable for systems with hot-water priority as an external signal can immediately force the pump to operate according to the max. curve, for example in solar heating systems.Features & Benefits: Grundfos MAGNA1 D 32 220 A RatedEuP Ready Variable Speed Twin Head Circulator 240VLow noise levelMaintenance-free and long lifeLow energy consumptionSimple installationSafe selectionLiquid temperature range from -10°C to 110°CWater pumped liquidThree proportional-pressure curves, three constant-pressure curves and three fixed-speed curves availableNine light fields for indication of pump settingsComplies with EuP requirementsThis MAGNA1 32 series 240V circulator has 180mm port-to-port dimensions and 2" BSPM screwed connections. This MAGNA1 circulator pump is designed for circulating liquids in heating systems with variable flows and for domestic hot-water systems.Applications include main pump, mixing loops, heating systems, air-conditioning and heating. This pump is also suitable for systems with hot-water priority as an external signal can immediately force the pump to operate according to the maximum curve, for example in solar heating systems.Features & Benefits: MAGNA1 D 240 A RatedEuP Ready Variable Speed Twin Head Circulator 240VLow noise levelMaintenance-free and long lifeLow energy consumptionSimple installationSafe selectionLiquid temperature range from -10°C to 110°CWater pumped liquidThree proportional-pressure curves, three constant-pressure curves and three fixed-speed curves availableNine light fields for indication of pump settingsComplies with EuP requirementsThese MAGNA1 D50-40 to 50-80 circulators have 240mm port-to-port dimensions, D50-120 to D50-180 have 280mm port-to-port dimensions and all have 50mm flanged connections. Please note: Due to differences in port-to-port dimensions when replacing MAGNA or UPS/D models with an indicated MAGNA1, a space kit may be required. These are available as two kits; 40mm MAGNA3 models or 50mm MAGNA3 models. Each set includes a suitable spacer, a set of extended bolts, nuts and three gaskets.

This MAGNA1 circulator pump is designed for circulating liquids in heating systems with variable flows where it is desirable to optimise the setting of the pump duty point, thus reducing energy costs. This pump is also suitable for domestic hot-water systems. To ensure correct operation, it is important that the sizing range of the system falls within the duty range of the pump. This variable speed single head circulator is suitable for main pump, mixing loops, heating and air conditioning systems. This MAGNA1 32 Series has 180mm port-to-port dimensions and 2" BSPM threaded connections.Features & Benefits: Grundfos MAGNA1 25 180 Variable Speed Single Head Circulator 240VLong lifeNo maintenanceLow noise levelThree proportional-pressure curves, three constant-pressure curves and three fixed-speed curves availableNine light fields for indication of pump settingComplies with the EuP requirementsLow energy consumptionSimple installation Product SpecificationLength

product.name: Grundfos UPS2 Light Commercial Pump
product.description:
Grundfos high efficiency UPS2 circulator pumps feature advanced control modes which allow for the adjustment of their performance to the specific system requirements in one- and two-pipe heating systems. These sturdy, versatile pumps are made of cast iron and are suitable for commercial heating as well as domestic hot water recirculation. Their motor is designed with the use of permanent-magnet and compact-rotor ECM (Electronically Commutated Motor, which is highly efficient) technology, which facilitates low energy consumption as well as silent operation and is compliant with the ErP directive No 641/2009. They offer both fixed speed and proportional pressure settings. Grundfos UPS2 pumps have a maximum operating pressure of up 10 bar and can deal with a flow rate of 5.7 m3/h. Models 25-80 (with a 1 1/2" connection) and 32-80 (with a 2" connection) are available. They're compact, with a port-to-port length of 180mm, which makes them an excellent replacement for older models that's easy to install in tight places.Features & Benefits: Grundfos UPS2 Light Commercial PumpHigh performance cast iron circulator pumpsEEI Product SpecificationGrundfos
UPS2 25-80 Light Commercial Pump
UPS2 32-80 Light Commercial Pump
product.variant_name: Grundfos UPS2 Light Commercial Pump 32-80

product.name: Grundfos MAGNA1 450 A RatedEuP Ready Variable Speed Circulator 240V
product.description:
This Grundfos MAGNA1 100 series (450) 'A' Rated/EuP Ready variable speed circulator with an easy selection of pump settings has no maintenance requirements and an extremely low life cycle cost. This MAGNA1 circulator pump is designed for circulating liquids in heating systems with variable flows and for domestic hot-water systems.Applications include heating systems, air-conditioning and heating, main pump and mixing loops. This pump is also suitable for systems with hot-water priority as an external signal can immediately force the pump to operate according to the max. curve, for example in solar heating systems.Features & Benefits: Grundfos MAGNA1 450 A RatedEuP Ready Variable Speed Circulator 240VThree proportional-pressure curves, three constant-pressure curves and three fixed-speed curves availableNine light fields for indication of pump settingsLow noise levelComplies with EuP requirementsMaintenance-free and long lifeLow energy consumptionWater pumped liquidSimple installationLiquid temperature range from -10°C to 110°CSafe selection This MAGNA1 100 series circulator has 450mm port-to-port dimensions and 100mm flanged connections. product.description:
This MAGNA1 circulator pump is designed for circulating liquids in heating systems with variable flows where it is desirable to optimise the setting of the pump duty point, thus reducing energy costs. This pump is also suitable for domestic hot-water systems.To ensure correct operation, it is important that the sizing range of the system falls within the duty range of the pump. This variable speed single head circulator is suitable for a range of heating systems including main pump, mixing loops, heating and air-conditioning. This pump is also suitable for domestic hot-water systems. To ensure correct operation, it is important that the sizing range of the system falls within the duty range of the pump. product.name: MAGNA1 360 A RatedEuP Ready Variable Speed Circulator 240V
product.description:
This Grundfos MAGNA1 80 series (360) 'A' Rated/EuP Ready variable speed circulator with an easy selection of pump settings has no maintenance requirements and an extremely low life cycle cost. This MAGNA1 circulator pump is designed for circulating liquids in heating systems with variable flows and for domestic hot-water systems.Applications include heating systems, air-conditioning and heating, main pump and mixing loops. This pump is also suitable for systems with hot-water priority as an external signal can immediately force the pump to operate according to the max. curve, for example in solar heating systems.Features & Benefits: MAGNA1 360 A RatedEuP Ready Variable Speed Circulator 240VThree proportional-pressure curves, three constant-pressure curves and three fixed-speed curves availableNine light fields for indication of pump settingsLow noise levelComplies with EuP requirementsMaintenance-free and long lifeLow energy consumptionWater pumped liquidSimple installationLiquid temperature range from -10°C to 110°CSafe selection This MAGNA1 80 series circulator has 360mm port-to-port dimensions and 80mm flanged connections. product.name: Grundfos MAGNA1 25 180 A RatedEuP Ready Variable Speed Circulator 240V
product.description:
With the addition of this MAGNA1 variable speed circulator from Grundfos, you can deliver the required high energy efficiency, but with a reduced set of features. This pump can offer the perfect solution in a refurbishment situation where you need to either replace a Grundfos UPS product or one of the smaller models from the original Magna family. This pump is designed for circulating liquids in heating systems with variable flows where it is desirable to optimise the settings of the pump duty point, thus reducing energy costs. This MAGNA1 circulator comes complete with electronically controlled motors that are based on permanent magnet (PM) and stator technology. This circulator has been designed for circulating liquids in a wide range of light commercial and commercial applications including heating, air conditioning and cooling, domestic water, ground-source heat pump and solar heating systems. Features & Benefits: Grundfos MAGNA1 25 180 A RatedEuP Ready Variable Speed Circulator 240VLow energy consumptionComplies with EuP 2013 and 2015 requirementsSimple installationNine possible pump settingsLow noise levelMinimal maintenanceLong lifeConstant curve/constant speed dutyRange is available for a maximum system pressure of 16 bar (PN16)Proportional and constant pressure control Providing proportional and constant pressure control, this circulator does not require external motor protection and has a constant curve/speed duty. Insulating shells are supplied with single-head pumps for heating systems. This circulator has a wide temperature range where the liquid temperature and the ambient temperature are independent of each other. Product SpecificationMaterial
Brass

product.name: Grundfos MAGNA1 25 180 A RatedEuP Ready Variable Speed Circulator 240V
product.description:
With the addition of this MAGNA1 variable speed circulator from Grundfos, you can deliver the required high energy efficiency, but with a reduced set of features. This pump can offer the perfect solution in a refurbishment situation where you need to either replace a Grundfos UPS product or one of the smaller models from the original Magna family. This pump is designed for circulating liquids in heating systems with variable flows where it is desirable to optimise the settings of the pump duty point, thus reducing energy costs. This MAGNA1 circulator comes complete with electronically controlled motors that are based on permanent magnet (PM) and stator technology. This circulator has been designed for circulating liquids in a wide range of light commercial and commercial applications including heating, air conditioning and cooling, domestic water, ground-source heat pump and solar heating systems. Insulating shells are supplied with single-head pumps for heating systems. This circulator has a wide temperature range where the liquid temperature and the ambient temperature are independent of each other. Product SpecificationMaterial

product.description:
This Grundfos MAGNA1 (180) 'A' Rated/EuP Ready variable speed circulator with an easy selection of pump settings has no maintenance requirements and an extremely low life cycle cost. This MAGNA1 circulator pump is designed for circulating liquids in heating systems with variable flows and for domestic hot-water systems.Applications include heating systems, main pumps, mixing loops and heating and air conditioning. This pump is also suitable for systems with hot-water priority as an external signal can immediately force the pump to operate according to the max. curve, for example in solar heating systems.Features & Benefits: Grundfos MAGNA1 32 180 A RatedEuP Ready Variable Speed Circulator 240VSafe selectionSimple installationLow energy consumptionComplies with EuP requirementsNine light fields for indication of pump settingThree proportional-pressure curves, three constant-pressure curves and three fixed-speed curves availableLow noise levelMaintenance-free and long lifeWater pumped liquidLiquid temperature range from -10°C to 110°CThis MAGNA1 circulator has 180mm port-to-port dimensions and 2" BSPM screwed connections.Product SpecificationMaterial

product.name: Grundfos MAGNA1 340 A RatedEuP Ready Variable Speed Circulator 240V
product.description:
This Grundfos MAGNA1 65 series (340) 'A' Rated/EuP Ready variable speed circulator with an easy selection of pump settings has no maintenance requirements and an extremely low life cycle cost. This MAGNA1 circulator pump is designed for circulating liquids in heating systems with variable flows and for domestic hot-water systems.Applications include air-conditioning and heating, mixing loops, main pump and heating systems. This pump is also suitable for systems with hot-water priority as an external signal can immediately force the pump to operate according to the max. curve, for example in solar heating systems.Features & Benefits: Grundfos MAGNA1 340 A RatedEuP Ready Variable Speed Circulator 240VSafe selectionLiquid temperature range from -10°C to 110°CSimple installationWater pumped liquidLow energy consumptionMaintenance-free and long lifeComplies with EuP requirementsLow noise levelNine light fields for indication of pump settingsThree proportional-pressure curves, three constant-pressure curves and three fixed-speed curves availableThis MAGNA1 65 series circulator has 340mm port-to-port dimensions and 65mm flanged connections. product.name: Grundfos MAGNA1 240 A RatedEuP Ready Variable Speed Circulator 240V
product.description:
With the addition of this MAGNA1 variable speed circulator from Grundfos, you can deliver the required high energy efficiency, but with a reduced set of features. This pump can offer the perfect solution in a refurbishment situation where you need to either replace a Grundfos UPS product or one of the smaller models from the original Magna family. This pump is designed for circulating liquids in heating systems with variable flows where it is desirable to optimise the settings of the pump duty point, thus reducing energy costs. This MAGNA1 circulator comes complete with electronically controlled motors that are based on permanent magnet (PM) and stator technology. This circulator has been designed for circulating liquids in a wide range of light commercial and commercial applications including heating, air conditioning and cooling, domestic water, ground-source heat pump and solar heating systems. Features & Benefits: Grundfos MAGNA1 240 A RatedEuP Ready Variable Speed Circulator 240VProportional and constant pressure controlRange available for a maximum system pressure of 16 bar (PN16)Constant curve/constant speed dutyLong lifeMinimal maintenanceLow noise levelNine possible pump settingsSimple installationComplies with EuP 2013 and 2015 requirementsLow energy consumption Providing proportional and constant pressure control, this circulator does not require external motor protection and has a constant curve/speed duty. Insulating shells are supplied with single-head pumps for heating systems. This circulator has a wide temperature range where the liquid temperature and the ambient temperature are independent of each other. Product Specification0.1mm

product.name: John Guest Speedfit 135 Degree Stem Elbow
product.description: John Guest created this Speedfit stem elbow to create cross-over connections between Speedfit fittings at 135°, including pipes that are (inserts required) Speedfit PEX, polybutylene, and copper. Without the need for hot works, tools, or adhesives, the push-fit installation process is incredibly fast and saves you plenty of time in both mounting and demounting the fitting. The added twist and lock mechanism forms a compression fitting and keeps the connections form and tight.Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit 135 Degree Stem ElbowVersatile in an array of applications, including hot and cold water and central heating  Unlikely to corrode and non-toxic  Utilises a seat of stainless steel teeth and an O-ring  BSI and WRAS approved.

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Tank Connector
product.description: This John Guest Speedfit tank connector is a WRAS Approved Push-fit plastic fitting for the connection of plastic and copper pipe. Manufactured in the UK, this tank connector is easy to use and fully demountable. Suitable for hot, cold and central heating purposes, this tank connector is available in a range of sizes. The strictest control is maintained by virtue of the fact that design and manufacture are carried out in modern purpose-built manufacturing centres in west London and at Maidenhead in Berkshire. Maintaining control over the whole process from initial tool design and tool making through to final assembly and testing ensures that this tank connector is produced to the highest quality. John Guest Speedfit believe that it is this commitment to quality that has led to it receiving awards from many of the world's leading testing and approvals organisations.Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Tank ConnectorPush-fit and demountable connectionsBSI and WRAS approvedSuitable for hot and cold water and central heating systemsNo scale build-upCorrosion-freeGrip and seal connectionLead-freeNon-toxicRange of sizes

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Superseal Push-Fit Plastic Pipe Insert
product.description: Speedfit plastic pipe inserts by John Guest provide extra support to pipework when connecting a pipe to a fitting. Ideal for hot and cold water and central heating systems, they help keep pipe ends round, minimising any loss of shape which might occur when you're cutting them. Thanks to the two additional O-ring seals, these inserts support pipework structure and facilitate a more effective seal between the outside diameter of the pipe and the O-ring. Available in sizes from 10mm to 28mm in diameter, Superseal inserts can be used with copper pipes designed to a BS EN 1057 standard and Speedfit barrier pipes designed to a BS7291 standard. They're approved by the WRAS (Water Regulations Approval Scheme) and the BBA (British Board of Agrément), so you know they're designed to the highest requirements.Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Superseal Push-Fit Plastic Pipe InsertPush-fit, fully demountable plastic pipe inserts  Suitable for hot and cold water and central heating systems  Grip and seal connection  Lead-free  Corrosion-free  Available in 10mm-28mm sizes  WRAS and BBA approved

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Female Coupler Tap Connector
product.description: This John Guest Speedfit tap connector has a push-fit plastic fitting with a grip and seal connection with stainless steel teeth and a main O-Ring seal. Compatible with Speedfit PEX, polybutylene plastic pipes (with inserts required) and copper pipes, this Speedfit tap connector is quick and easy to use and can be fully dismantled.This female coupler tap connector can be used for hot and cold water and central heating purposes and is ideal for the connection of taps and toilets. This product is non-toxic and free from lead. Made in a way that prevents scale build-up, this tap connector remains Corrosion Free throughout its use. JG has regulated this tap connector from start to finish, from the initial design through to the final assembling and testing to ensure this product is of the highest quality, designed and manufactured in west London and at Maidenhead in Berkshire.Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Female Coupler Tap ConnectorSuitable for central heating purposes and hot and cold water  Compatible with copper pipes, polybutylene plastic pipes (inserts required) and Speedfit PEX  Grip & Seal collet with stainless steel teeth and main O-Ring seal  Demountable connections without the need for tools  Easy to assemble in confined spaces with instant push-fit and hand-tightening connection  Safe installation without the need for hot works, glue or flux  Corrosion Free and preventative of scale build-up  Lead-free and non-toxic  BSI and WRAS approved  Designed, manufactured and assembled in the UKJohn Guest believes their commitment to quality products has led to their ability to produce products of the highest standards and this tap connector has received Water Regulations Advisory Scheme (WRAS) and British standards (BSI) approval. This Female Coupler Tap Connector is available in a range of sizes from 10mm x ½ BSP to 22mm x ¾ BSP.

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Flexi Hose Monobloc Mixers
product.description: These push-fit flexi hoses are suitable for the connection of plastic and copper pipe to a female mixer tap and have been designed, manufactured and assembled in the UK by John Guest Speedfit. These hoses are ideal for the connection to monobloc mix taps. To make a connection, simply push the fitting fully onto the pipe and screw the thread into the bloc. These hoses have offset spanner locations to ease installation. If the need arises to demount the connection, push the collet towards the body of the fitting and pull the pipe to release. These fittings ensure an easier working environment in confined places and remove the need for hot works on site. Installation can be reduced by around 40% against traditional fixing methods. Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Flexi Hose Monobloc MixersSold in pairsPush-fit and demountable connectionsWRAS approved6 Bar at 65°CRange of sizes availableFor the connection of plastic and copper pipe to a female monobloc mixer tapEasy to work with in confined placesRemoves the need for hot works on siteThe strictest control is maintained by virtue of the fact that design and manufacture are carried out in modern purpose-built manufacturing centres in west London and at Maidenhead in Berkshire. Maintaining control over the whole process from initial tool design and tool making through to final assembly and testing ensures that these monobloc mixer hoses are produced to the highest quality. John Guest Speedfit believe that it is this commitment to quality that has led to it receiving awards from many of the world's leading testing and approvals organisations. Please note: With all plastic pipes, the relevant manufacturer's insert is required.These monobloc mixer hoses are not suitable for central heating systems.

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Flexi Hose Valve Metal Connections
product.description: This push-fit flexi hose is suitable for the connection of plastic and copper pipe to a male thread appliance, ideal for connecting taps. It has been designed, manufactured and assembled in the UK by John Guest Speedfit. To isolate your appliance, simply turn the screw in the valve a ¼ turn. To make a connection, simply push the fitting fully onto the pipe and screw the nut onto the thread of the appliance. If the need arises to demount the connection, push the collet towards the body of the fitting and pull the pipe to release. This flexi hose, with a service valve and metal connections, ensures an easier working environment in confined spaces and removes the need for hot works on site. Installation can be reduced by around 40% against traditional fixing methods. John Guest Speedfit limited offer a two-year guarantee against any defect in materials or manufacture. Maintaining control over the whole process from initial tool design and tool making through to final assembly and testing ensures that this flexi hose is produced to the highest quality. John Guest Speedfit believe that it is this commitment to quality that has led to it receiving awards from many of the world's leading testing and approvals organisations. product.name: John Guest Speedfit Push-Fit Stop End
product.description: Speedfit stop ends by John Guest are suitable for capping off pipework at termination points in hot and cold water and central heating system temporarily or permanently. Thanks to the push-fit technology, they're quick and easy to fit - simply push them fully onto the pipe, and you're done! Additionally, they're fully demountable, so you can remove them just as quickly without the need for any tools. All it takes is pushing the collet towards the body of the stop end and pulling the pipe to release.These convenient fittings, which come in multiple sizes, feature a grip & seal collet with stainless steel teeth and a main O-Ring seal. Approved by the BSI (British Standards Institution) and the WRAS (Water Regulations Advisory Scheme), Speedfit stop ends are designed to the highest industry standards. They're perfect when you need to turn on water when there's an interruption in a job, for instance.Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Push-Fit Stop EndSturdy push-fit and demountable stop end  Grip and seal connection  Lead-free and-non-toxic  Corrosion-free and no scale build-up  Safe, quick and easy to install  BSI and WRAS approved  Available in 10mm, 15mm, 22mm and 28 mm sizes

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Push-Fit Stop End
product.description: Speedfit stop ends by John Guest are suitable for capping off pipework at termination points in hot and cold water and central heating system temporarily or permanently. Thanks to the push-fit technology, they're quick and easy to fit - simply push them fully onto the pipe, and you're done! Additionally, they're fully demountable, so you can remove them just as quickly without the need for any tools. All it takes is pushing the collet towards the body of the stop end and pulling the pipe to release.These convenient fittings, which come in multiple sizes, feature a grip & seal collet with stainless steel teeth and a main O-Ring seal. Approved by the BSI (British Standards Institution) and the WRAS (Water Regulations Advisory Scheme), Speedfit stop ends are designed to the highest industry standards. They're perfect when you need to turn on water when there's an interruption in a job, for instance.Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Push-Fit Stop EndSturdy push-fit and demountable stop end  Grip and seal connection  Lead-free and-non-toxic  Corrosion-free and no scale build-up  Safe, quick and easy to install  BSI and WRAS approved  Available in 10mm, 15mm, 22mm and 28 mm sizes
product.variant_name: John Guest Speedfit Stop End - 15mm

product.name: John Guest Speedfit 5 Layer PEX Barrier Pipe Coil
product.description: Speedfit PEX (Cross-Linked Polyethylene, an alternative to plastic and copper for home plumbing) barrier pipes are lightweight and flexible, making them perfect for underfloor heating installations. Thanks to their low thermal conductivity, these pipes are cooler and safer to touch when carrying hot water. They feature an inner barrier which prevents the flow of air. Produced and kitemarked to BS7291: Parts 1, 2 and 3: Class S standard, Speedfit PEX pipes are accredited by the BSI (British Standards Institution), WRAS (Water Regulations Approval Scheme) and several other organisations. They're available in diameter sizes of 10mm to 22mm and multiple lengths to suit the specific requirements of your project. To function in a screed system, the pipes are attached directly to insulation with staples, floor clips or mounting rails.Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit 5 Layer PEX Barrier Pipe CoilFlexible, lightweight PEX pipesSuitable for central heating systemsLead-free and non-toxicPlease note: John Guest Speedfit pipe inserts must be used with these pipes.
product.variant_name: John Guest Speedfit 5 Layer PEX Barrier Pipe Coil - 10mm x 25m

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Flexi Hose Plastic Wingnut - 300mm
product.description: This hand-tighten-only flexi hose is suitable for the connection of plastic or copper pipe onto a male thread appliance such as a tap and has been designed, manufactured and assembled in the UK by John Guest Speedfit. The flexi hose with an "SV" also features a valve to isolate the water supply.On one end, this hose features a push-fit connection for a supply pipe and on the other end, there is a plastic nut which can be hand tightened onto a tap or male thread. If the need arises to demount the pipe, simply push the collet towards the body of the fitting and pull the pipe to release. Installation can be reduced by around 40% against traditional fixing methods. Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Flexi Hose Plastic Wingnut - 300mmSold in singles6 Bar at 65°CPush-fit and demountable connectionsWRAS approvedPVC hose materialRange of sizes availableFor the connection of plastic or copper pipe onto a male thread applianceSpeedfit x union nutPlastic wingnutHand tightened The strictest control is maintained by virtue of the fact that design and manufacture are carried out in modern purpose-built manufacturing centres in west London and at Maidenhead in Berkshire. Maintaining control over the whole process from initial tool design and tool making through to final assembly and testing ensures that this flexi hose is produced to the highest quality. John Guest Speedfit believe that it is this commitment to quality that has led to it receiving awards from many of the world's leading testing and approvals organisations. Please note: With all plastic pipes, the relevant manufacturer's insert is required.This flexi hose is not suitable for central heating systems.
product.variant_name: John Guest Speedfit Flexi Hose Plastic Wingnut - 15mm x 1/2 inch x 300mm

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Plastic Push-Fit Straight Connector
product.description: These straight connectors are part of John Guest's flexible and easy-to-use 'SpeedFit' range and are case-in-point for the advantages of this simple and effective system. The push-to-fit design of the SpeedFit range massively reduces installation time compared to traditional hot works or even compression fittings, up to 40% reduction, saving you precious time and money on-site.Combine the ease of installation with the fully demountable nature of the system, natural scale and corrosion resistance of plastic, as well as BSI and WRAS approval, and the whole SpeedFit range stands out as a versatile and flexible system for a range of domestic applications. These straight connectors come in a range of diameters and securely joint two lengths of piping together.Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Plastic Push-Fit Straight ConnectorSimple, straightforward push-and-screw design cuts down on installation time massivelySuitable for all types of plastic and copper pipe with JG pipe insertsNatural resistance to limescale and corrosionHuge variety of fittings and diameters across the rangePlease note: John Guest pipe inserts are required depending on the material and pipe diameter used.

The push-to-fit design of the SpeedFit range massively reduces installation time compared to traditional hot works or even compression fittings, up to 40% reduction, saving you precious time and money on-site.Combine the ease of installation with the fully demountable nature of the system, natural scale and corrosion resistance of plastic, as well as BSI and WRAS approval, and the whole SpeedFit range stands out as a versatile and flexible system for a range of domestic applications. These straight connectors come in a range of diameters and securely joint two lengths of piping together.Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Plastic Push-Fit Straight ConnectorSimple, straightforward push-and-screw design cuts down on installation time massivelySuitable for all types of plastic and copper pipe with JG pipe insertsNatural resistance to limescale and corrosionHuge variety of fittings and diameters across the rangePlease note: John Guest pipe inserts are required depending on the material and pipe diameter used.
product.variant_name: John Guest Speedfit Plastic Push-Fit Straight Connector - 28mm

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Push-Fit Plastic Equal Tee
product.description: The John Guest Speedfit equal tee is a push-fit plastic fitting that connects copper and plastic pipes. It's demountable and easy to use, making it an ideal solution for all hot, cold and central heating systems. This equal tee is highly resistant to chemicals and suitable for potable liquids and pure water applications alike.Speedfit equal tees are approved by the WRAS (Water Regulations Approval Scheme) and BSI (British Standards Institution), so you know they meet all relevant regulations and requirements. They're available in sizes from 10mm to 28mm, making them extremely versatile.Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Push-Fit Plastic Equal TeeSuitable for hot and cold water and central heating systemsGrip and seal connectionCorrosion free

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Flexi Hose Nut With Service Valve
product.description: This push-fit flexi hose is suitable for the connection of plastic and copper pipe to a male thread appliance, ideal for connecting taps. It has been designed, manufactured and assembled in the UK by John Guest Speedfit. To isolate your appliance, simply turn the screw in the valve a ¼ turn. To make a connection, simply push the fitting fully onto the pipe and screw the nut onto the thread of the appliance. If the need arises to demount the connection, push the collet towards the body of the fitting and pull the pipe to release. This flexi hose fitting ensures an easier working environment in confined places and removes the need for hot works on site. Installation can be reduced by around 40% against traditional fixing methods. John Guest Speedfit limited offer a two-year guarantee against any defect in materials or manufacture. Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Flexi Hose Nut With Service ValveService valveSpeedfit x union nutFor the connection of plastic and copper pipe to a male thread applianceRange of sizes availableWRAS approvedPush-fit and demountable connections6 Bar at 65°CSold in singles2-year guarantee The strictest control is maintained by virtue of the fact that design and manufacture are carried out in modern purpose-built manufacturing centres in west London and at Maidenhead in Berkshire. Maintaining control over the whole process from initial tool design and tool making through to final assembly and testing ensures that this flexi hose is produced to the highest quality. John Guest Speedfit believe that it is this commitment to quality that has led to it receiving awards from many of the world's leading testing and approvals organisations. Please note: With all plastic pipes, the relevant manufacturer's insert is required.This flexi hose is not suitable for central heating systems.
product.variant_name: John Guest Speedfit Flexi Hose Nut With Service Valve - 22mm x 3/4 inch x 300mm

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Pushfit Plastic Reducing Tee Fitting
product.description: John Guest Speedfit reducing tees are push-fit plastic fittings which connect plastic and copper pipes. Fully demountable and easy to use, they are ideal for hot, cold and central heating purposes. Whats more, they are highly resistant to chemicals and suitable for potable liquids as well as pure water applications. Speedfit reducing tees are also approved by the WRAS (Water Regulations Approval Scheme), which guarantees they are compliant with all relevant regulations. They are available in multiple sizes to meet your every need.  WRAS approved and highly chemically resistant. product.name: John Guest Speedfit MDPE Stop Tap
product.description: This stop tap is a plastic push-fit valve that can be used to connect MDPE. This uniquely designed fitting incorporates stainless teeth to provide a tight and secure grip on the pipe. By turning the handle, in less than two turns, the flow of water can be stopped. The connection is demountable if required, ensuring your system is easy to work when in the ground and needing to maintain and alter an existing set-up. The all-plastic construction minimises the possibility of the valve seizing over time. Installation time is greatly reduced when compared to traditional fixing methods. product.name: John Guest Speedfit Mounting Rail and Pins
product.description: The John Guest Speedfit Mounting Rail and Pins provide a fast and efficient solution for securing 15mm underfloor heating pipes in screed floor systems. Designed for installations where insulation is too thin for staples, this system is ideal for new builds and extensions, ensuring a high heat output and quick response. By securing the pipe directly to the clip rails, it allows for a reliable and evenly distributed heating system that maximises efficiency and comfort.Each pack includes 16 mounting rails, each measuring 2 metres in length, making installation straightforward. The clip rails sit securely on top of rigid insulation sheets, which are then placed over the concrete subfloor, creating a stable and durable heating setup.Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Mounting Rail and PinsDesigned for 15mm screed floor systems, perfect for thin insulation setupsFast and simple installationPack of 16 (2m lengths)
