product.name: John Guest Speedfit Cold Forming Bend
product.description: To form a tighter fixed bend than plastic pipes allow when unsupported, this John Guest Speedfit cold forming bend is the perfect option. Rather than fiddling with joints and fittings, using a cold forming bend makes bending pipes much easier while simultaneously preventing your pipe from gaining any kinks that may alter the flow. Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Cold Forming BendAvailable for 15mm and 22mm pipes  Made in the UK  Suitable for use with plastic or copper pipe  For hot and cold water and heating applications.

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Release Aid
product.description: This John Guest Speedfit Release aid helps to overcome the action of pressure in a system which could increase the grip of the collet. Providing a firmer grip on the collet when removing pipes allows for a quick and easy demounting method for pipework from a JG Speedfit fitting. product.name: John Guest Speedfit Conduit Pipe
product.description: This John Guest Speedfit Conduit Pipe is designed to perfectly protect plumbing pipes that are installed in concrete or masonry. Available in black, red, and blue, these tubes mean that your pipes can be colour-coded, identifiable, and sheltered all at the same time. product.name: John Guest Speedfit Underfloor Heating Foil Faced Board Systems
product.description: This overfit board system by John Guest consists of a grooved foil faced insulation panel intended for the installation of 15mm tubing designed to BS 7291 standard over an existing floor. Quick and easy to fit, it's ideal for both new build and renovation projects. The system uses radiant heat, which ensures even and comfortable distribution of warmth across the entire room. Each panel is 600mm by 1250mm by 25mm in size, with pipe spacing of 150mm. The recommended heat flow is in the 50ºC-60ºC range. This overfit board is approved by the WRAS (Water Regulations Approval Scheme), British Gas Service and other organisation, so you know John Guest have maintained the strictest control during the manufacturing process.Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Underfloor Heating Foil Faced Board SystemsHigh performance overfit insulation board system for 15mm tubing  600mm x 1250mm x 25mm individual panel size  13-15m2 typical cover per loop  50-60w/m2 heat output  100m maximum circuit length  150mm pipe spacing  Quick and easy to install
product.variant_name: John Guest Speedfit Board Systems Overfit Board JGUFHBOARD1x1 - 600mm x 1250mm x 25mm

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Underfloor Heating Manifolds With Push-Fit Connections
product.description: Made of stainless steel, John Guest Speedfit manifolds are quick and easy to install, thanks to the push-fit connections to the heating pipe. To make things even easier, they're pre-fitted with brackets, vibration isolation mounts and an automatic air vent. These manifolds come with protective dust caps on the return rail, which you can remove when installing the product. They also feature circuit actuator valves that open and close the flow of water to each pipe loop. You can assemble them to suit left or right hand supply for greater convenience.And that's not all. These high performance manifolds are approved by the BSI (British Standards Institution), WRAS (Water Regulations Approval Scheme) and several other institutions, so you know they're designed to the highest standards. They're available with anywhere from 2 to 12 ports, making them extremely versatile.Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Underfloor Heating Manifolds With Push-Fit ConnectionsPre-fitted with bracketsIntegral Auto Air Vent discharges any air that might impact circulationValves on the return manifold fully compatible with thermoelectric heads
product.variant_name: John Guest Manifolds John Guest Speedfit 10 Zone Manifold JGUFHMAN10/3

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Underfloor Heating Manifolds With Push-Fit Connections
product.description: Made of stainless steel, John Guest Speedfit manifolds are quick and easy to install, thanks to the push-fit connections to the heating pipe. To make things even easier, they're pre-fitted with brackets, vibration isolation mounts and an automatic air vent. These manifolds come with protective dust caps on the return rail, which you can remove when installing the product. They also feature circuit actuator valves that open and close the flow of water to each pipe loop. You can assemble them to suit left or right hand supply for greater convenience.And that's not all. These high performance manifolds are approved by the BSI (British Standards Institution), WRAS (Water Regulations Approval Scheme) and several other institutions, so you know they're designed to the highest standards. They're available with anywhere from 2 to 12 ports, making them extremely versatile.Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Underfloor Heating Manifolds With Push-Fit ConnectionsPre-fitted with bracketsIntegral Auto Air Vent discharges any air that might impact circulationValves on the return manifold fully compatible with thermoelectric heads

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Polybutylene Layflat Pipe
product.description: Made in the UK by JG Speedfit, this Layflat Polybutylene Pipe has even greater flexibility, making it incredibly easy to handle and worry-free. This barrier pipe is ideal for long runs where a softer pipe material is an advantage, so cabling through joints becomes a simple task.When removed from the coil, this pipe keeps straight and 'lays flat' meaning there are no issues with retaining its memory and trying to coil back into place. It is made of five layers, the centre of which is a coloured oxygen barrier, which prevents air ingress into the system, reducing the effect of corrosion on metal components. Due to its low thermal conductivity when carrying hot water, it is cooler and therefore safer to touch. Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Polybutylene Layflat PipeLays flat and stays flatEasy to handle and ideal for cabling through joists Suitable for central heating systems Polybutylene material for extra flexibility Manufactured and Kitemarked to British Standard BS7291: Parts 2 and Class S Lightweight and ultra flexible Lead-free and non-toxicThe strictest control is maintained because design and manufacture are carried out in modern purpose-built manufacturing centres in west London and Maidenhead in Berkshire. Controlling the whole process, from initial tool design and tool making to final assembly and testing, ensures that only products of the highest quality are produced. John Guest Speedfit believe that this commitment to quality has led to it receiving awards from many of the world's leading testing and approvals organisations.

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Aura Internet Hub
product.description: This Aura Internet Hub (JGHUB2) from John Guest is fantastic for upgrading any JG Aura Wireless system in order to have the Internet control option. A plug and play hub is required for internet interface, which then allows complete control over time and temperature in all zones directly from your smartphone, computer or tablet with the John Guest Aura App.The JG Aura Hub accommodates up to 10 internet-enabled thermostats. If more thermostats are needed, the hub's capacity can be expanded by purchasing the JG Aura License (JGHUB1) which allows an additional capacity to control 10 more thermostats (max capacity 30).Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Aura Internet HubFor upgrading JG Aura wireless systemsJG Aura app is compatible with iOS, Android and Windows phonesAllows Internet control optionsFor 10 internet-enabled thermostats

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Aura Thermostat HW
product.description: This 4 in 1 Aura Thermostat allows combined control of UFH and individual radiators. It is simple to install the multi-zone energy-saving systems in new or retrofit projects. Each thermostat can be operated as a Programmable Room Thermostat, Group Control Thermostat, Group Thermostat or a Hot Water Timer. product.name: John Guest Speedfit Flexi Hose
product.description: This push-fit flexi hose is suitable for the connection of plastic and copper pipe to a male thread appliance, ideal for connecting taps. It has been designed, manufactured and assembled in the UK by John Guest Speedfit. This connector uses a grip and seal, collet arrangement. Simply push the fitting fully onto the pipe and screw the nut onto the thread of the appliance. If the need arises to demount the connection, push the collet towards the body of the fitting and pull the pipe to release. This flexi hose fitting ensures an easier working environment in confined spaces and removes the need for hot works on site. Maintaining control over the whole process from initial tool design and tool making through to final assembly and testing ensures that this flexi hose is produced to the highest quality. John Guest Speedfit believe that it is this commitment to quality that has led to it receiving awards from many of the world's leading testing and approvals organisations. With all plastic pipes, the relevant manufacturer's insert is required.|This flexi hose is not suitable for central heating systems. product.name: John Guest Speedfit Push-Fit Flexi Hose & Union Nut
product.description: The John Guest Speedfit Push-Fit Flexi Hose & Union Nut is a versatile and practical solution for connecting the popular Speedfit system to male-threaded appliances. Designed for seamless integration, this single flexi hose is ideal for use in confined spaces like kitchens and utility rooms, making it a perfect choice for both residential and commercial plumbing applications. The flexible steel hose offers a secure fit with Speedfit collet clips, ensuring a reliable connection that is quick and easy to install.Fully demountable and WRAS-approved, this flexi hose provides peace of mind and compatibility with a wide range of systems. Its robust construction and user-friendly design make it a convenient choice for installers and DIY enthusiasts alike. product.name: John Guest Speedfit Flexi Hose Plastic Wingnut With Service Valve  - 15mm x 1/2 inch
product.description:
This hand-tighten-only flexi hose is suitable for the connection of plastic or copper pipe onto a male thread appliance such as a tap and has been designed, manufactured and assembled in the UK by John Guest Speedfit. The flexi hose with an "SV" also features a service valve to isolate the water supply.On one end, this hose features a push-fit connection for a supply pipe and on the other end, there is a plastic nut which can be hand tightened onto a tap or male thread. If the need arises to demount the pipe, simply push the collet towards the body of the fitting and pull the pipe to release. Installation can be reduced by around 40% against traditional fixing methods.Features & Benefits: John Guest Speedfit Flexi Hose Plastic Wingnut With Service Valve  - 15mm x 1/2 inchSold in singles6 Bar at 65°CPush-fit and demountable connectionsWRAS approvedPVC hose materialRange of sizes availableFor the connection of plastic or copper pipe onto a male thread applianceSpeedfit x union nutThe strictest control is maintained by virtue of the fact that design and manufacture are carried out in modern purpose-built manufacturing centres in west London and at Maidenhead in Berkshire. Maintaining control over the whole process from initial tool design and tool making through to final assembly and testing ensures that this flexi hose is produced to the highest quality. John Guest Speedfit believe that it is this commitment to quality that has led to it receiving awards from many of the world's leading testing and approvals organisations. Please note: With all plastic pipes, the relevant manufacturer's insert is required.
This flexi hose is not suitable for central heating systems.

product.name: Ideal Logic Combi2 Boiler
product.description: The Ideal Logic Combi2 Boiler is a compact, high-efficiency combination boiler designed for medium homes with 91% central heating efficiency, helping to reduce bills. Its fully modulating operation ensures energy efficiency by adjusting the heat output to match demand, reducing energy consumption and operating costs.Installation is straightforward, thanks to features like a low lift weight, compact design that fits into standard kitchen cupboards, and preformed copper tails with a pre-wired mains lead. The boiler also includes built-in frost protection, a universal condensate connection, and a simple-to-use control interface.Features & Benefits: Ideal Logic Combi2 BoilerErP A Rated for Heating & Hot WaterBuilt-in, easy to use filling loopEasy to see pressure gaugePlease note: It is a legal requirement to have your boiler installed by a certified Gas Safe installer. Please do not attempt to install if you don't have the correct certification.Please check the correct boiler type has been ordered before opening the box. Returns can only be accepted if the packaging is unopened and undamaged.If once the boiler has been installed you notice something wrong, please contact your Gas Safe installer first and they'll work with the manufacturer to resolve it under the warranty.There is a 15% restocking fee that applies to most returns.

product.name: Ideal Vogue Max Combi Boiler with Ideal System Filter
product.description: The Ideal Vogue Max Combi Boiler with Ideal System Filter combines premium performance and built-in protection in one package. It's a wall-hung condensing boiler delivering both central heating and domestic hot water. Its composite outer casing conceals a stainless-steel heat exchanger, and thanks to the inclusion of a system filter, this boiler helps safeguard against debris and sludge, a key factor in maximising lifespan and reliability.For installers, the Vogue Max is designed to save time and reduce issues. It boasts a low lift weight, pre-wired mains lead, and push-fit flue collar, simplifying on-site installation. product.name: Ideal Atlantic Combi Boiler with Vertical Flue
product.description: Compact but capable, the Ideal Atlantic Combi Boiler with Vertical Flue is engineered for smaller properties that demand both heating and hot water from a single unit. It handles day-to-day demand efficiently without overwhelming the system. Its slim dimensions allow it to fit neatly into a kitchen cupboard or compact boiler room.Built for ease of service, the Atlantic C24 shares internal components with the trusted Ideal Logic+ range, meaning parts, servicing practices, and diagnostics are familiar to installers. product.name: Samsung EHS Mono R32 3Phase Air-to-Water Outdoor Heat Pump
product.description: The Samsung EHS Mono R32 3-Phase Outdoor Heat Pump is a powerful and efficient air-to-water system designed for homes that need reliable, year-round heating and cooling. Because it's a monobloc unit, everything is contained outdoors, including refrigerant and water circuits. Its 3-phase power design makes it ideal for larger properties or homes with higher electrical capacity, while the use of R32 refrigerant ensures strong performance with a lower environmental impact.With a COP of 5.00 and a SCOP of 4.48, this model delivers excellent energy efficiency, keeping running costs low while maintaining comfortable temperatures throughout the home. The BLDC Twin Rotary compressor ensures smooth, quiet operation, and the system provides both 8kW heating and 7.5kW cooling capacity.Features & Benefits: Samsung EHS Mono R32 3Phase Air-to-Water Outdoor Heat PumpHigh efficiency COP 5.00 and SCOP 4.48 for excellent energy savingsMonobloc designQuiet, robust performance: BLDC Twin Rotary compressor with low 48 dBA sound level

product.name: Samsung EHS Mono R290 3Phase Air-to-Water Outdoor Heat Pump
product.description: The Samsung EHS Mono R290 3-Phase A2W Outdoor Heat Pump is an ultra-efficient, low-carbon heating solution engineered for both residential and commercial properties. Using R290 refrigerant, which has an exceptionally low Global Warming Potential (GWP) of only 3, this system supports sustainable heating while delivering water temperatures up to 75°C. Designed for cold-weather performance, it maintains 100% heating output even down to -10°C.This advanced heat pump also features Samsung's latest noise-reduction technology, including a double-layered acoustic insulation structure with patented Groove Grid Felt to absorb vibrations and compressor noise. With a 4-step Quiet Mode, the unit can operate at sound levels as low as 35 dB(A), making it one of the quietest high-temperature heat pumps available.Features & Benefits: Samsung EHS Mono R290 3Phase Air-to-Water Outdoor Heat PumpHigh-temperature output up to 75°CUltra-quiet operation down to 35 dB(A) using Samsung's 4-step Quiet ModeSmartThings Energy integration for monitoring and AI-driven energy savings

product.name: Clivet Edge EVO 2.0-EXC Monobloc 1Phase Heat Pump
product.description: The Clivet Edge EVO 2.0-EXC 1-Phase Monobloc Heat Pump is a compact, all-in-one air-to-water system ideal for small homes seeking efficient heating, cooling and domestic hot water. With a single-phase operation, it suits typical residential electrical supplies while offering strong performance in demanding conditions. Despite its small footprint, it operates reliably down to -25 °C and can deliver hot water up to 65 °C.As a monobloc unit, all components are housed outdoors, simplifying installation and removing the need for indoor refrigeration equipment. The system also supports smart control through the MSmartLife App or Modbus integration, enabling remote monitoring and flexible management. Its efficient inverter technology helps reduce running costs while maintaining stable temperatures throughout the home.Features & Benefits: Clivet Edge EVO 2.0-EXC Monobloc 1Phase Heat PumpSingle-phase monobloc for compact installationsOperates to -25 °C and supplies up to 65 °C waterSmart control via MSmartLife App or Modbus

product.name: Clivet Edge F R290 3Phase Monobloc Heat Pump
product.description: The Clivet Edge F R290 3-Phase Monobloc Heat Pump is a sustainable, high-efficiency air-to-water system designed for larger homes and demanding residential applications. Using R290 propane refrigerant, it delivers strong thermodynamic performance with extremely low environmental impact and zero on-site CO2 emissions. With its quiet operation and robust 3-phase power, it offers reliable, year-round comfort.Designed for modern energy-smart homes, the system supports app-based control, solar and photovoltaic integration, and smart-grid readiness. An integrated energy meter enables monitoring of produced and absorbed energy over time. Its monobloc outdoor design simplifies installation, while its renewable operation makes it a future-ready alternative to traditional boilers.Features & Benefits: Clivet Edge F R290 3Phase Monobloc Heat PumpHeating & cooling with hot water up to 75°CR290 refrigerant for low-carbon, high-efficiency performanceSmart-grid, solar and app-based control compatibility
product.variant_name: Clivet Edge F R290 8.1T 3Phase Monobloc Heat Pump - 15kW

product.name: Clivet Edge F R290 1Phase Monobloc Heat Pump
product.description: The Clivet Edge F R290 1-Phase Monobloc Heat Pump is a compact, high-efficiency air-to-water system providing heating in winter and cooling in summer from a single unit. Using ultra-low-GWP R290 refrigerant, it delivers sustainable performance with zero CO2 emissions at the point of use, producing more heat with less energy consumed. Suitable for renovations and modern homes alike, it works efficiently even with radiator systems thanks to supply temperatures up to 75°C, and operates reliably down to -25°C. Its quiet design, from 40 dB(A), makes it ideal for residential settings.Featuring built-in Wi-Fi smart control, the unit integrates easily with solar thermodynamic systems and includes an energy meter for tracking energy produced and absorbed over time.Features & Benefits: Clivet Edge F R290 1Phase Monobloc Heat PumpHeating & cooling in one R290 high-efficiency monoblocWorks with radiators up to 75°C water temperatureUp to six units can be combined in a cascade arrangement
